description: A work-in-progress matching decompilation of Mario Kart Wii (PAL version RMCP01)

kart.description: Kart physics, dynamics, movement, collision, suspension, wheels, hitbox, input, settings

system.description: RaceConfig, RaceManager, ResourceManager, KPadController/Director, GhostFile, CourseMap, CourseCheckpoints, DvdArchive, MultiDvdArchive, LocalizedArchive, Mii, Rating, NandUtil

geo.description: Game objects: ObjKuribo, ObjFloat, ObjSound, ObjSunDS, ObjTaimatsu, ObjKoopaFigure64, ObjOilSFC, BoxColManager/Unit, ObjectDirector/Factory/Parameter, MapObjSniper

net.description: NetManager, MiscPacketHandler, packet types: EVENT, ITEM, ROOM, SELECT, USER, RACEHEADER1/2, RACEDATA, PacketHolder

ui.description: UI system: Page, Section, SectionDirector, SectionAutogens, UIControl, ControlGroup, MessageGroup, RTTI

enemy.description: AI system: AI, AIControl, AIEngine, AIInfo, AIItem, AILookAt, AIManager, AIPath, AIProbability, AIRank, AISpeed, AITrickHandler

field.description: Course collision: CourseColManager, CourseModel, CollisionEntries, CollisionInfo, ObjColManager, RKGndCol, KCollision, DrivableColInfo

core.description: eggHeap, eggExpHeap, eggUnitHeap, eggAllocator, eggSystem, eggVideo, eggDisplay, eggScene, eggSceneManager, eggThread, eggTaskThread, eggDvdFile, eggDvdRipper, eggCompress, eggDecomp, eggStreamDecomp, eggArchive, eggXfb, eggXfbManager, eggViewport, eggGraphicsFifo, eggAsyncDisplay, eggColorFader, eggProcessMeter, eggDisposer, eggTextureBuffer, g3d_scnrfl

gfx.description: eggFog, eggFogManager, eggIScnProc, eggLightManager, eggLightObject, eggScnRenderer

g3d.description: 3D graphics: camera, fog, resdict, resfile, state

math.description: Math: types, arithmetic, cast, constants, triangular

snd.description: Sound: dvdSoundArchive, frameHeap, sndArchive, soundArchiveFile, soundHeap, soundMemoryAllocatable

ut.description: Utilities: IOStream, fileStream, dvdFileStream, nandFileStream, List, LinkList, font, resFont, romFont, glyph, charWriter, color, lockedCache, RTTI, Inlines, binaryFileFormat, CharStrmReader

os.description: OS: memory, threads, alarms, interrupts, reset, arena, cache, context, error, mutex, alloc, font, message, RTC, semaphore, link, fatal

gx.description: Graphics: GX API (attributes, draw, fifo, geometry, light, misc, pixel, texture, transform, vert, perf, bump, framebuf, tev)

ax.description: Audio: AX API (alloc, aux, cl, comp, dspCode, out, prof, spb, vpb)

mem.description: Memory: heap allocator, expHeap, frmHeap, unitHeap, list

bte.description: Bluetooth: BTE, GAP, L2CAP, RFCOMM, SDP

ssl/db/sc/cnt/net/vi.description: Various SDK headers (SSL, debug, card, content, network, video)

lib_gamespy.description: GameSpy multiplayer SDK (C) - online multiplayer infrastructure

lib_MSL.description: Metrowerks Standard Library (C runtime: stdio, stdlib, string, math, ctype, memory, etc.)

decompilation_approach_details.compiler: Metrowerks CodeWarrior for Embedded PowerPC (via wibo/wine on non-Windows)
tools: objdiff (for diffing compiled output vs original binary)
Seeky's ppcdis (PowerPC disassembler for auto-generating ASM from binaries)
decompilation_approach_details.verification: Builds main.dol and StaticR.rel; verifies byte-for-byte match against original PAL binaries
workflow: 1. Analyze target binary in Ghidra to understand function behavior
2. Create slice definitions (address ranges) for new TUs
3. Write C++ code that produces matching PPC assembly via decomp.me
4. Replace inline ASM stubs with matching C++ implementations
5. Use symbol renaming tools to tie references together

kart_physics.notes: Core kart physics and dynamics partially decompiled

ai_system.notes: Most AI files are header-only (stubs); AI.cpp and AITrickHandler.cpp have implementations

networking.notes: Network packet handling decompiled; GameSpy SDK provides underlying infrastructure

course_collision.notes: Course geometry and collision detection systems

system.notes: Best-decompiled game module; most system files have implementations

game_objects.notes: Course object system with several object types decompiled

egg_library.notes: Core EGG middleware (heaps, system, display, scene, archive, thread, etc.) is well-decompiled

nw4r_library.notes: NW4R utilities (ut/ module) well-decompiled; g3d, lyt, snd partially done

rvl_sdk.notes: Much of the Revolution SDK decompiled (OS, GX, AX, MEM, etc.)

gamespy_sdk.notes: Full GameSpy SDK decompiled (GP, ghttp, gt2, qr2, serverbrowsing, gstats, sake, etc.)

documentation_copied: HACK.md (project structure, build system, decompilation workflow)
CONTRIBUTING.md (how to contribute, function matching tools)
config/RMCP01/module/ (module splits and symbols for StaticR.rel)
tools/ (build tooling: ninja_syntax, project, decompctx, apply_symbol_mappings, etc.)
